original_title: EMOT-011 Enjoy The POV Perfection Of A Newly Wed Life With Rika Aimi
overview: A video where you become the main character and enjoy your newlywed life with Rika Aimi! I'm Rika. I just got married last month and I'm a newlywed squirrel. My husband is older and very kind and always wraps me around. But if there is only one dissatisfaction, my husband is too naughty ... Please experience our married life!
